slide1_text: Do you know about God's love and His wonderful plan for your life?
slide2_body1: God's love is so great that He offers you eternal life with Him through Jesus.
slide2_quote1: "For God so loved the world, that he gave his only Son, that whoever believes in him should not perish but have eternal life."
slide2_body2: God's plan is to give you an abundant and meaningful life in Jesus. Jesus said,
slide2_quote2: "I came that they may have life and have it abundantly."
slide3_body: In the beginning, God created the universe and everything in it. God made human beings in His own image so we can know Him, love Him and worship Him. He wants to give you eternal life in heaven and abundant life on earth. He is a good king and He is love!
slide4_body: We live in sin. God made us to worship Him alone. But we served other gods and raised ourselves That is sin. Sin separates us from God. That's why our hearts are filled with darkness - like greed, selfishness, pride and hatred. God hates sin, because He is righteous. One day we will all die and stand before God and be punished for our sins. We are all destined to go to hell forever!
slide5_quote: "God so loved the world that He gave His only Son, Jesus, that whoever believes in Him should not perish but have eternal life!"
slide5_body: Jesus Christ is the Son of God! Yet He became a man just like us! He lived a perfect life without sin. God, however, made Jesus die on the cross as a sacrifice for our sins. He paid for the penalty of all our sins with His blood!
slide6_title: JESUS WAS BURIED IN A CAVE TOMB. BUT ON THE THIRD DAY, HE RESURRECTED FROM THE DEAD!
slide6_body: Jesus conquered sin and death! Then God took Jesus back to heaven. One day, Jesus will come again to judge the world!
slide7_title: JESUS IS "THE ONLY WAY" WE CAN COME TO GOD!
slide7_quote: "I am the way, and the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me!"
slide7_body: Jesus opened a new way leading to God. There is only ONE WAY and ONE SAVIOR, Jesus Christ! Jesus alone can forgive your sins and save you!
slide8_title: SO REPENT OF YOUR SIN AND BELIEVE IN JESUS AS YOUR SAVIOR!
slide8_quote: "Whoever believes in Him has eternal life and is not judged."
slide8_body: He will lead you to heaven. If you cry out, "Jesus I am a sinner, have mercy on me!", then He will come and save you. But if you reject Him, then the wrath of God remains on you! You will die in your sins, and suffer eternal punishment in hell.
slide9_quote: "if you believe in Jesus and confess with your mouth that Jesus is Lord, you shall be saved."
slide9_body1: If you want to receive Jesus in your heart, you can pray this prayer:
slide9_prayer: "Lord Jesus, I need You. Thank You for dying on the cross for my sins. I open the door of my life and receive You as my Savior and my Lord. Thank You for forgiving my sins and giving me eternal life. I pray this in Jesus' name. Amen."
slide9_body2: Do you want to pray to receive Jesus right now? Then, as you believe, pray this prayer sincerely! Jesus said,
slide9_quote2: "Whoever comes to me I will never cast out."
slide10_text1: When you received Jesus as your Savior, you became a child of God and part of the family of God.
slide10_text2: You have eternal life in Jesus.
slide10_text3: Jesus promised that He would be with you forever.
slide10_text4: God gives you a new life. In order to live an abundant and fruitful life, you need to live out your belief in Jesus by obeying His commands.
slide11_text2: Because God loves us, we love God and others.
slide11_text3: Read and study the Bible, the Word of God, daily.
slide11_text4: The word of God is our spiritual food. The word of God is the light to guide our life according to His will.
slide12_text2: God, our Father, wants to have constant conversations with us.
slide12_text3: Talk to God about both your joy and your concern on all occasions.
slide13_text1: Go to church and meet regularly with other believers.
slide13_text2: Jesus promised to be with us when two or three people gather together in His name.
slide14_text1: Tell others the good news about Jesus.
slide14_text2: Go and tell your family and your friends about Jesus and about your new life in Jesus.
slide15_text1: Welcome to the family of God. God also wants to save your family.
slide15_text2: Get your family and friends together at your house to pray and to worship God.
slide16_body: If you want to know more about the Gospel, please contact:
